title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Financial Services to make an investigation and study of certain current Senate documents relative to credit unions.

abstracts.abstract: The committee on Financial Services, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 766) of Adam Gomez for legislation to authorize municipalities to deposit into credit unions; and (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 837) of John C. Velis for legislation to strengthen the state credit union charter, report the accompanying Order  (Senate, No. 3113).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Financial Services
Order reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
